pkgmetadata.longdescription: Python JSON RPC ServerA Python 3.6+ server implementation of the [JSON RPC 2.0](httpwww.jsonrpc.orgspecification) protocol. This library has been pulled out of the [Python LSP Server](httpsgithub.compython-lsppython-lsp-server) project. Installation pip install -U python-jsonrpc-server ExamplesThe examples directory contains two examples of running language servers over websockets. exampleslangserver.py shows how to run a language server in-memory. exampleslangserver_ext.py shows how to run a subprocess language server, in this case the Python LSP Server.Start by installing tornado and python-language-server pip install python-lsp-server[all] tornadoThen running python exampleslangserver.py or python exampleslangserver_ext.py will host a websocket on wslocalhost3000python.
